'''yanongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zealotry|zealotry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zealotry|zealotry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yanongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yænengeth|yænengeth]] || [[word:yænengej|yænengej]] || [[word:yænengesh|yænengesh]] || [[word:yænenge|yænenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yanonongoth|yanonongoth]] || [[word:yanonongoj|yanonongoj]] || [[word:yanonongosh|yanonongosh]] || [[word:yanonongo|yanonongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yanongoth|yanongoth]] || [[word:yanongoj|yanongoj]] || [[word:yanongosh|yanongosh]] || [[word:yanongo|yanongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yanofngofth|yanofngofth]] || [[word:yanofngofj|yanofngofj]] || [[word:yanofngofsh|yanofngofsh]] || [[word:yanofngof|yanofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yanongotho|yanongotho]] || [[word:yanongojo|yanongojo]] || [[word:yanongosho|yanongosho]] || [[word:yanongoko|yanongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yanongoth|yanongoth]] || [[word:yanongoj|yanongoj]] || [[word:yanongosh|yanongosh]] || [[word:yanongo|yanongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yanongothol|yanongothol]] || [[word:yanongojol|yanongojol]] || [[word:yanongoshol|yanongoshol]] || [[word:yanongokol|yanongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yanongoothotho|yanongoothotho]] || [[word:yanongoojojo|yanongoojojo]] || [[word:yanongooshosho|yanongooshosho]] || [[word:yanongooko|yanongooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yanongothon|yanongothon]] || [[word:yanongojon|yanongojon]] || [[word:yanongoshon|yanongoshon]] || [[word:yanongokon|yanongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yanongothooro|yanongothooro]] || [[word:yanongojooro|yanongojooro]] || [[word:yanongoshooro|yanongoshooro]] || [[word:yanongokooro|yanongokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
